prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock AMC 390 (Gen-1 'Typhoon' V8, engine code: AMX-390) with a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products, featuring a 4.165" stroke crankshaft, 6.125" H-beam connecting rods, and Mahle 10.5:1 forged pistons with moly-coated skirts for durability under high-RPM stress. Pair with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (248°/254° duration, 0.544"/0.565" lift, 110° LSA) and adjustable rocker arms from Harland Sharp for precise valvetrain control.

Forced Induction: Install a Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 76mm exducer, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom-built T4/T3 hybrid manifold by Stainless Works, utilizing 1.75" primary tubes and a 3" V-band downpipe. Pair with a Turbosmart Comp-Gate 40 wastegate (12psi base boost) and a TiAL MV-R 50mm external wastegate for precise boost control. Intercooling handled by a custom air-to-water setup with a PWR North America heat exchanger and a Bosch 044 fuel pump feeding ID1000cc injectors from Injector Dynamics.

Drivetrain & Handling: Swap the stock BorgWarner T-10 4-speed for a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (26-spline, 10.5" diaphragm) and a steel flywheel. Suspension upgrades include a full Global West subframe connectors kit, QA1 double-adjustable coilovers (2.5" front, 2.0" rear) with custom valving for the AMX’s 97.2" wheelbase, and a Detroit Speed front sway bar (1.25" diameter) paired with a Hotchkis rear sway bar (0.875"). Braking is upgraded to Wilwood 6-piston front calipers with 13" rotors and 4-piston rear calipers with 12" rotors, using Hawk HT-10 brake pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Body: Install a full RK Sport widebody kit (1970-specific AMX panels) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. The hood is replaced with a custom 3-piece carbon fiber unit from Seibon with a functional 4" cowl induction scoop. Rear quarter windows are replaced with Lexan panels from Vintage Air for weight reduction, and the stock bumpers are swapped for lightweight aluminum replicas from Goodmark Industries, powder-coated in satin black.

Aero & Lighting: Add a custom rear wing from APR Performance (GT-250 model, 3D carbon fiber) mounted on aluminum pedestals, paired with a front lip spoiler from RK Sport. Lighting is upgraded to Hella 500 Series headlights with Cibie Oscar projectors and LED halo rings, while the rear features sequential LED taillights from United Pacific. Side markers are replaced with smoked LED units from JW Speaker.

Interior & Wheels: The cabin is stripped and fitted with a full roll cage from Autopower (8-point, bolt-in, 1.75" x .120" DOM tubing) and Recaro SRD front seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. The dashboard is replaced with a custom aluminum panel from Classic Instruments, featuring a Stack analog boost gauge, AEM wideband AFR gauge, and a Defi oil pressure/temperature combo. Wheels are 17x9" and 17x11" BBS RS-GT (gold centers, polished lips) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear).
